hallucination.rationale: The HPI is entirely fabricated. The transcript only mentions knee pain briefly as the chief complaint; all details about right knee, 3 months duration, sharp/aching pain, front of knee, stairs, stiffness, locking/catching denial, ibuprofen use, swelling, 'warm puffy feeling,' work as a teacher, and no recent injuries are completely invented.
flagged_content: pain in her right knee for about 3 months now
sharp, aching pain, primarily located in the front of her knee
worse with activity, like walking up stairs or walking on uneven surfaces
stiffness in her knee, especially in the morning
denies any locking or catching in her knee
tried over-the-counter pain relievers like ibuprofen
has not had any recent injuries to her knee

instruction_following.rationale: The note completely fails to follow instructions: template placeholders and parenthetical instructions are left unfilled throughout, the note is duplicated over 20 times, and the vast majority of transcript content (alcohol use discussion, AUDIT-C, psychosocial stressors, labs, plan, referrals) is entirely absent while fabricated content fills the HPI.

completeness.rationale: The note misses virtually all key transcript content: alcohol use history, AUDIT-C screening, psychosocial stressors, mother's stroke, counseling on reduction strategies, BASICS referral, drinking diary recommendation, lab orders (CMP, CBC, B12/folate), MRI referral, and 6-week follow-up plan.
missed_items: Increased alcohol use pattern and details
Psychosocial stressors (mother's stroke, caregiving, husband traveling)
Counseling on structured reduction and 30-day abstinence reset

template_adherence.rationale: Template placeholders and parenthetical instructions are left verbatim throughout every section (Review of Systems, Past Medical History, Medications, Allergies, Social History, Family History, Vital Signs, Physical Exam, Assessment, Plan). No sections were actually completed.

entity_marking.rationale: No entity marking was attempted anywhere in the note. No {{drug:...}} or {{condition:...}} syntax is present.

duplication.rationale: The entire note is duplicated approximately 20+ times in succession.
